name: commerceops-ai-os
description: AI automation and systems engineering portfolio project for e-commerce operations.

scripts.setup: npm install && npm run py:venv && npm run py:install
scripts.py:install: .venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.data:bootstrap: npm run data:download && npm run data:convert && npm run data:prepare
scripts.db:reset: npm run db:schema && npm run db:load
